description: PARALLAX-5 AI-FV Co-Pilot v0.1 benchmark corpus. 100 Solidity contracts spanning five tiers: synthetic obligation exemplars, substrate-provided demos and archetypes, catalog incident reproductions, top-DeFi production code (Etherscan), and synthesized vulnerability exemplars.

tiers.A-synthetic: Hand-written minimal exemplars; ground-truth-known obligation behavior.
tiers.B-substrate: Contracts shipped with the PARALLAX-5 substrate (v1.0.1).
tiers.C-catalog: Minimal reproductions of incidents from the substrate paper's 53-incident catalog (§10).
tiers.D-etherscan: Production contracts fetched via Etherscan V2 API; verified on-chain code.
tiers.E-vulnerable-exemplars: Synthesized vulnerable patterns covering common smart-contract bug classes.
